purpose: QA-driven follow-up after the 0.36/0.52 matrix sample drifted in identity and hair silhouette. This profile tightens Canny guidance and adds short-hair identity-stability language while keeping the v3 right-edge-masked control input.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait of an adult man, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights and visible iris detail, gently open eye shadows, short natural textured hair matching the control silhouette, stable face shape matching the control image, edge-guided but natural composition, coherent face silhouette, clean but not over-sharpened jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm plain continuous neutral interior background, seamless right image edge, no visible wall panel boundary, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, porcelain skin, over-sharpened skin, gritty skin, over-sharpened edges, dark edge halos, harsh outlines, black contour stains, identity drift, changed face shape, long hair, feminine hairstyle, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, colored blotches, paint marks, dim eye sockets, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, right-edge seam, vertical seam, background panel line, border artifact, edge strip, window band, light bar, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: recovery from identity and hair-silhouette drift
